semantics.name: broadcast_control
semantics.label: Broadcast
semantics.description: Negative control: broadcast presence semantics; edge choice never enters the carrier.

semantics.name: committed_allocation
semantics.label: Committed Allocation
semantics.description: Positive control: variable-to-edge assignment with disjoint-domain segment composition on the V-hypergraph.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_lower
semantics.label: Pair Phase SL
semantics.description: Pair phase mod 2: a shared claim into the lower edge toggles when the upper edge is already live; odd phase suppresses lower completion.

semantics.name: pair_phase_shared_other_live_block_upper
semantics.label: Pair Phase SU
semantics.description: Pair phase mod 2 with upper-edge suppression.

semantics.name: pair_phase_any_other_live_block_lower
semantics.label: Pair Phase AL
semantics.description: Pair phase mod 2: any claim into a pair edge toggles once the opposite edge is already live; odd phase suppresses lower completion.

semantics.name: pair_phase_exclusive_other_live_block_lower
semantics.label: Pair Phase XL
semantics.description: Pair phase mod 2 triggered only by exclusive claims into a live pair.

semantics.name: braid_orientation_shared_other_live
semantics.label: Braid Orient
semantics.description: Orientation token records which pair edge received the decisive shared claim once the other edge is live; the oriented edge is blocked on completion.

semantics.name: transport_debt_shared_other_live
semantics.label: Debt Shared
semantics.description: Capped debt token increments when a shared claim lands across a live overlap; level 2 debt blocks lower-edge completion.

semantics.name: catalytic_pair_activation
semantics.label: Catalytic Pair
semantics.description: A latent pair catalyst latches when the overlap pair first becomes jointly live; active catalyst blocks lower-edge completion.

semantics.name: simplex_phase_triangle_activate
semantics.label: Simplex Phase
semantics.description: Triangle-phase mod 2 toggles when a nerve triangle first becomes jointly live; odd phase blocks the lowest edge completion.

semantics.name: simplex_orientation_triangle_activate
semantics.label: Simplex Orient
semantics.description: Triangle orientation remembers which edge activated the live 2-simplex; that edge is blocked on completion.
